title: Mob Vote Pack
description: Makes the game have the same style as the mob/biome votes videos!
body:
![showcase image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mtdFXrpZ/images/3a020296a2b765a55c879e9e9651e0104bb2d01f.png)

![pack requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebcc77d601455476cbd816a92986eb88aa27ac05.png)
## Summary

Ever wanted your game to look like the minecraft vote videos? Well, with this pack you can! This unofficial pack aims to remake all the game's texture to have that beautiful looking mob vote style.

## FAQ:

<details>
<summary>Why do all the mobs have weird and glitchy textures?</summary>
  
Since this pack's texture resolution is 1.5x times minecraft's default textures, some mob textures are gonna be glitchy, and you'll need to install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) to fix that.


</details>

<details>
<summary>Why does every texture looks blurry?</summary>

If you are using optifine (which you should be, the pack requires it for some features to work) you'll need to go to `options>video settings>quality` and then lower `mipmapping` to 3.
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Is this pack made by mojang?</summary>
No, this is an unofficial pack made by me (DM) and while it does use some of Mojang's textures from the mob vote videos, they are not affiliated with this pack.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Is there gonna be a bedrock version of this pack?</summary>
Yes I do plan on making a bedrock version of this pack in the future.
</details>

Did this not answer your question? Did you find a bug and want to report it? You can reach out to me on  Discord!
